user_goal: Orchestrate and produce a compelling original drama package (core premise, character arcs, beat outline, opening scene) with strong emotional stakes and escalating conflict.

mandates.title: Tragic Core Architect
mandates.objective: Design the moral engine of the drama: central dilemma, irreversible choices, and thematic spine.
method: Define protagonist wound/want/need/flaw from first principles.
Map escalating cost ladder (professional, relational, legal, existential).
Propose a final choice that resolves theme through action, not exposition.
evidence_requirements: Each beat must increase stakes or force a value tradeoff.
Theme must be expressible as a conflict sentence.
Ending must create both loss and earned transformation.
non_goals: Do not draft polished scene dialogue.
Do not add genre detours that dilute core drama.
stop_conditions: A clear premise + dilemma + climax decision are provided.
Character arc is causally tied to plot turns.

mandates.title: Character Psychology Designer
mandates.objective: Create psychologically credible principal characters with distinct voices and relational fractures.
method: Build compact dossiers for protagonist, antagonist force, and two key supporting roles.
Specify contradiction pairs (public mask vs private fear).
Define relationship dynamics that can shift power scene-to-scene.
evidence_requirements: Each character has an actionable goal and hidden fear.
At least two relationships include betrayal potential.
Dialogue voice cues are concrete and differentiable.
non_goals: Do not provide generic archetypes without specificity.
Do not over-expand cast beyond story needs.
stop_conditions: 4-5 characters are complete with arc direction and pressure points.

mandates.title: Structure & Beat Composer
mandates.objective: Produce a tight 3-act beat sheet with turning points and escalation rhythm suitable for screenplay or prose drama.
method: Set act breaks by commitment/reversal/reckoning logic.
Flag midpoint reversal and dark-night collapse with clear consequences.
evidence_requirements: Each act changes what the protagonist believes is possible.
Climax must force choice between two valued goods.
non_goals: Do not write full script pages.
Do not use deus ex machina resolutions.
stop_conditions: Complete beat map from opening image to final image is delivered.

mandates.title: Scene Tension & Dialogue Specialist
mandates.objective: Draft a high-grip opening scene that demonstrates subtext, conflict, and immediate stakes.
method: Start in motion with a professional process under stress.
Embed personal history through behavior and interruption, not exposition.
End scene on a destabilizing hook.
evidence_requirements: Contains at least one power shift.
non_goals: Do not overwrite with lyrical monologues.
stop_conditions: One complete opening scene is produced with clear dramatic hook.

mandates.title: Audience Impact & Refinement Editor
mandates.objective: Pressure-test originality, emotional resonance, and cohesion; propose concrete refinements.
method: Audit for cliche risk and predictability.
Score emotional pacing across setup, midpoint, collapse, climax.
Provide targeted rewrites for weakest moments.
evidence_requirements: At least 5 specific improvement notes with examples.
Identify one unique motif to unify story.
Confirm ending payoff matches premise promise.
non_goals: Do not rewrite entire story from scratch.
Do not introduce new major subplots late.
stop_conditions: Actionable revision memo with prioritized fixes is complete.
